2605.11378.title: An Empirical Study of Automating Agent Evaluation
2605.11378.paper_summary: Agent evaluation requires assessing complex multi-step behaviors involving tool use and intermediate reasoning, making it costly and expertise-intensive. A natural question arises: can frontier coding assistants reliably automate this evaluation process? Our study shows that simply prompting coding assistants is insufficient for this task. Without domain-specific evaluation knowledge, frontier coding assistants achieve only a 30% execution success rate and produce over-engineered evaluations averaging 12+ metrics per agent, indicating that strong coding ability does not automatically translate to reliable agent evaluation. We introduce EvalAgent, an AI assistant that automates the end-to-end agent evaluation pipeline. EvalAgent encodes evaluation domain expertise as evaluation skills (procedural instructions, reusable code and templates, and dynamically retrieved API documentation) that compose into a trace-based pipeline producing complete evaluation artifacts including metrics, executable code, and reports. To systematically assess generated evaluations, we introduce a meta-evaluation framework alongside AgentEvalBench, a benchmark comprising 20 agents, each paired with evaluation requirements and test scenarios. We further propose the Eval@1 metric to measure whether generated evaluation code both executes and yields meaningful results on the first run. Our experiments show that EvalAgent produces focused evaluations, improving Eval@1 from 17.5% to 65%, and achieving 79.5% human expert preference over baseline approaches. Further ablation studies show that evaluation skills are critical for handling complex evaluation: removing them causes Eval@1 to drop significantly from 65% to 30%.
2605.11378.paper_summary_zh: 代理評估需要評估涉及工具使用和中介推理的複雜多步驟行為，這使得該過程成本高昂且需要專業知識。自然會產生一個問題：前沿編碼助手能否可靠地自動化這一評估過程？我們的研究表明，僅僅提示編碼助手對於這項任務是不夠的。沒有特定領域的評估知識，前沿編碼助手的執行成功率僅為30%，並且每個代理生成的評估平均超過12個指標，這表明強大的編碼能力並不自動轉化為可靠的代理評估。我們介紹了EvalAgent，一個自動化端到端代理評估流程的AI助手。EvalAgent將評估領域專業知識編碼為評估技能（程序指令、可重用代碼和模板，以及動態檢索的API文檔），這些技能組成一個基於跟蹤的流程，生成完整的評估產物，包括指標、可執行代碼和報告。為了系統性地評估生成的評估，我們引入了一個元評估框架，並推出了AgentEvalBench，一個包含20個代理的基準，每個代理都配有評估要求和測試場景。我們進一步提出了Eval@1指標，以測量生成的評估代碼是否能在第一次運行時執行並產生有意義的結果。我們的實驗顯示，EvalAgent生成的評估更加專注，將Eval@1從17.5%提高到65%，並在基準方法中達到79.5%的人工專家偏好。進一步的消融研究表明，評估技能對於處理複雜評估至關重要：去除它們會使Eval@1顯著下降，從65%降至30%。
2605.11378.author: Kang Zhou et.al.
2605.11378.authors: Kang Zhou, Sangmin Woo, Haibo Ding, Kiran Ramnath, Subramanian Chidambaram, Aosong Feng, Vinayak Arannil, Muhyun Kim, Ishan Singh, Darren Wang, Zhichao Xu, Megha Gandhi, Nirmal Prabhu, Soumya Smruti Mishra, Vivek Singh, Gouri Pandeshwar, Lin Lee Cheong
